task_completion.description: Verify that a new folder named 'Action-Required' has been created in the email client.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the email client's folder pane (usually on the left side) for a folder named exactly 'Action-Required'.

task_completion.description: Verify that at least 5 emails have been moved into the 'Action-Required' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the contents of the 'Action-Required' folder. The email list pane should display at least 5 distinct emails.

task_completion.description: Verify that a new email is addressed to 'ga@example.com'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an email compose window or a sent email where the 'To:' field contains 'ga@example.com'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the summary email has the subject 'Action Items'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Subject:' field in the compose window or sent email containing the text 'Action Items'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the body of the summary email contains a bulleted or numbered list of at least 3 specific tasks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the email body in the compose window or sent email. It must contain a clear bulleted or numbered list with at least 3 distinct task items.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical email client to perform the tasks rather than terminal commands or scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a standard GUI email client (like Thunderbird, Evolution, etc.), not a terminal window executing mail commands or python scripts.

integrity.description: The tasks listed in the summary email appear to be genuine content extracted from emails, not generic placeholder text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The bulleted list in the email body should contain specific, realistic tasks (e.g., 'Review patch', 'Send report') rather than generic text like 'Task 1', 'Task 2', 'Task 3'.

integrity.description: The 'Action-Required' folder is a genuine folder in the email client.
integrity.visual_evidence: The folder should appear in the standard folder hierarchy (e.g., under Inbox or Local Folders) with the standard folder icon, not as a text file or a visually mocked up element.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target folder name: 'Action-Required'. Minimum emails to move: 5. Summary email recipient: 'ga@example.com'. Summary email subject must be 'Action Items' (or contain keywords: action, todo, to-do, tasks, follow-up). The summary email body must contain a bulleted/numbered list of at least 3 tasks. Actionable emails typically contain keywords like 'please', 'need to', 'fix', 'asap', 'urgent', 'deadline', etc.
